title: Impact of Tokenization on Machine Translation
desc: Investigating the correlation between vocabulary size (BPE, Unigram) and NMT metrics — how segmentation choices affect translation consistency across similar language pairs.

title: Machine Unlearning in VLMs
desc: Evaluated targeted forgetting algorithms in vision-language models to erase specific knowledge subsets using Sparse Autoencoders.

title: Subliminal Learning and Token Entanglement
desc: Studied representational leakage and token entanglement in language models — how implicit concepts are learned under controlled prompting.

title: Information Retrieval System
desc: Built a full IR pipeline — crawler, indexer, ranker — from scratch. Compared TAAT and DAAT scoring strategies against ElasticSearch benchmarks.

title: Sequence Labeling for Indian Languages
desc: CRF-based systems for Hindi NER and Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis, with feature engineering and context-window tuning for structured prediction.
